title: heptapleurum leytense
intro: Heptapleurum leytense, also known as the Leyte club fern, is a type of plant belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Heptapleurum leytense include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in the Philippines to treat various health conditions.
